allow: PowerShell($adb = "C:\\Users\\User\\AppData\\Local\\Android\\Sdk\\platform-tools\\adb.exe"; & $adb wait-for-device; $ok=$false; for \($i=0; $i -lt 60; $i++\){ $b = \(& $adb shell getprop sys.boot_completed 2>$null\); if \($b -match "1"\) { $ok=$true; break }; Start-Sleep -Seconds 3 }; if \($ok\) { "BOOT OK"; & $adb devices } else { "TIMEOUT esperando boot" })

PowerShell($adb = "C:\\Users\\User\\AppData\\Local\\Android\\Sdk\\platform-tools\\adb.exe"; & $adb logcat -d -t 800 2>$null | Select-String -Pattern "ReactNativeJS|ExpoModules|getEnforcing|Invariant|TurboModule|Unable to|Exception|FATAL|could not|is not a function|Error:" | Select-Object -Last 60)

PowerShell($env:ANDROID_HOME = "C:\\Users\\User\\AppData\\Local\\Android\\Sdk"; & "D:\\projects\\nan-kamay\\android\\gradlew.bat" -p "D:\\projects\\nan-kamay\\android" :app:assembleRelease --console=plain 2>&1 | Select-String -Pattern "FAILURE|What went wrong|Execution failed|FAILED|error:|Caused by|^e: |A problem occurred|> " | Select-Object -First 40)
PowerShell($adb = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Android\\Sdk\\platform-tools\\adb.exe"; if \(Test-Path $adb\) { & $adb devices -l } else { Write-Output "adb no encontrado en $adb" })
PowerShell($emu = "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\Android\\Sdk\\emulator\\emulator.exe"; if \(Test-Path $emu\) { & $emu -list-avds } else { Write-Output "emulator.exe no encontrado en $emu" })

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== AVDs disponibles ==="; & "$env:ANDROID_HOME\\emulator\\emulator.exe" -list-avds; Write-Output "=== dispositivos/emuladores conectados ==="; & "$env:ANDROID_HOME\\platform-tools\\adb.exe" devices)

PowerShell($pkg = \(Get-Content "D:\\projects\\nan-kamay\\app.json" -Raw | ConvertFrom-Json\).expo.android.package; Write-Output "package: $pkg"; & "$env:ANDROID_HOME\\platform-tools\\adb.exe" shell monkey -p $pkg -c android.intent.category.LAUNCHER 1)

PowerShell($adb = "$env:ANDROID_HOME\\platform-tools\\adb.exe"; $devs = & $adb devices; if \($devs -match "emulator|device`t"\) { & $adb install -r "D:\\projects\\nan-kamay\\android\\app\\build\\outputs\\apk\\release\\app-release.apk"; & $adb shell monkey -p com.gepres.nankamay -c android.intent.category.LAUNCHER 1 } else { Write-Output "No hay emulador/dispositivo conectado" })

PowerShell($adb = "$env:ANDROID_HOME\\platform-tools\\adb.exe"; $d = & $adb devices; $d; if \($d -match "`tdevice"\) { Write-Output "--- instalando ---"; & $adb install -r "D:\\projects\\nan-kamay\\android\\app\\build\\outputs\\apk\\release\\app-release.apk"; & $adb shell monkey -p com.gepres.nankamay -c android.intent.category.LAUNCHER 1 | Out-Null; Write-Output "lanzada" } else { Write-Output "Sin dispositivo conectado" })

PowerShell($adb = "$env:ANDROID_HOME\\platform-tools\\adb.exe"; $d = & $adb devices; $d; if \($d -match "`tdevice"\) { & $adb install -r "D:\\projects\\nan-kamay\\android\\app\\build\\outputs\\apk\\release\\app-release.apk"; & $adb shell monkey -p com.gepres.nankamay -c android.intent.category.LAUNCHER 1 | Out-Null; Write-Output "instalada y lanzada" } else { Write-Output "Sin dispositivo conectado" })

PowerShell(try { New-NetFirewallRule -DisplayName "NanKamay-APK-8000" -Direction Inbound -Protocol TCP -LocalPort 8000 -Action Allow -Profile Private -ErrorAction Stop | Out-Null; Write-Output "Regla de firewall creada \(puerto 8000 abierto\)" } catch { Write-Output "No se pudo crear regla de firewall \(sin admin\): $\($_.Exception.Message\)" })

PowerShell(Write-Output "=== IPv4 local \(la que usaras en el telefono\) ==="; Get-NetIPAddress -AddressFamily IPv4 | Where-Object { $_.IPAddress -notmatch '^\(127\\.|169\\.254\)' } | Select-Object IPAddress, InterfaceAlias | Format-Table -AutoSize; Write-Output "=== servidores disponibles ==="; "python: " + \(Get-Command python -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; "py:     " + \(Get-Command py -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source; "node:   " + \(Get-Command node -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Source)

PowerShell($r = Get-NetFirewallRule -DisplayName "NanKamay-APK-8000" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($r\) { Write-Output \("Regla firewall 8000: EXISTE \(" + $r.Enabled + ", " + $r.Direction + "\)"\) } else { Write-Output "Regla firewall 8000: NO existe — puede que el telefono no conecte" })

PowerShell(try { New-NetFirewallRule -DisplayName "NanKamay-APK-8000" -Direction Inbound -Protocol TCP -LocalPort 8000 -Action Allow -Profile Private,Public -ErrorAction Stop | Out-Null; Write-Output "Regla creada \(puerto 8000 abierto\)" } catch { Write-Output \("No se pudo crear regla \(sin admin\): " + $_.Exception.Message\) })
